grant_title: Agricultural Conservation Funding Guide for Pennsylvania
geographic_restrictions: Primarily Pennsylvania, with some programs restricted to the Chesapeake Bay watershed or specific counties within Pennsylvania.
project_area: Agricultural conservation practices, including nutrient runoff reduction, soil health improvement, water quality protection, erosion control, and sustainable agriculture.
demographic_requirements: Varies by program. Common requirements include active farming status, compliance with agricultural plans (e.g., Ag E&S, Manure Management, Nutrient Management), and adherence to income limits or conservation criteria.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by program but generally includes farmers, agricultural landowners, businesses, nonprofits, and government entities. Many programs require active farming, compliance with conservation plans, and adherence to specific geographic or demographic criteria. Some programs prioritize projects in the Chesapeake Bay watershed or within designated tiers/counties.
